overall.description: Cinematic game engine footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a futuristic urban plaza at dusk. Two giant holographic koi fish, one orange and one blue, swim around a circular plaza surrounded by neon-lit skyscrapers while the camera performs a slow aerial orbit of the scene.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic urban plaza with holographic display system

events.description: orange and blue holographic koi fish cross paths at the center of the plaza

agents.ego_description: cinematic drone camera orbiting the plaza counter-clockwise, maintaining focus on the holographic display

notable_agents.action: large orange holographic koi fish swimming clockwise around the plaza perimeter
large blue holographic koi fish swimming counter-clockwise around the plaza perimeter

entered.detail: multi-tiered circular concrete plaza with embedded neon accent lighting and concentric rings
giant translucent orange-gold holographic fish with flowing fin details
giant translucent cyan-blue holographic fish with glowing filament fins
cluster of futuristic glass skyscrapers with vertical yellow neon strip lighting
tall modern buildings with illuminated windows and digital signage
tall building facade covered in large-scale digital advertisements between the fish

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a futuristic cyberpunk plaza at dusk, dominated by two massive holographic koi fish swimming in opposing directions. The orange fish begins on the left while the blue fish occupies the right, with both circling a central tiered concrete structure. Neon-lit skyscrapers frame the background as the camera begins its slow orbit, capturing the fish as they cross paths at the plaza center around the 15-second mark.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic urban plaza with holographic display system

events.description: holographic fish complete half circuit and swap positions, orange now on right and blue on left

agents.ego_description: continuing aerial orbit, now viewing the plaza from the opposite side as the previous segment

notable_agents.action: orange holographic koi fish continuing clockwise path, now positioned on the right side of frame
blue holographic koi fish continuing counter-clockwise path, now positioned on the left side of frame

segments.scene_description: As the camera continues its orbit around the plaza, the background skyscrapers shift from left to right in the frame. The holographic fish have swapped positions, with the orange fish now swimming on the right side and the blue fish on the left. They cross paths again at the center around 30 seconds, maintaining their continuous circular swimming pattern around the plaza structure.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic urban plaza with holographic display system

events.description: blue holographic koi fish swims very close to camera, filling the right side of the frame before passing by

agents.ego_description: completing the orbital path around the plaza, capturing a close-up pass of the blue holographic fish

notable_agents.action: blue holographic koi fish swimming very close to camera, dominating the foreground with translucent glowing fins
orange holographic koi fish swimming in the background, completing the circular path

segments.scene_description: The final segment completes the camera's orbit around the plaza, returning to the original viewing angle. The blue holographic koi makes a dramatic close pass to the camera around 60 seconds, its translucent glowing fins filling the right side of the frame before swimming past. The orange fish returns to the left side of the frame, and the background skyscrapers settle back to their original positions, completing the continuous loop of the scene.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a slow aerial orbit around a futuristic cyberpunk plaza at dusk, capturing the rhythmic movement of two massive holographic koi fish. It begins with the orange fish on the left and the blue fish on the right, both circling a central tiered concrete structure against a backdrop of neon-lit skyscrapers. As the camera continues its steady rotation, the fish cross paths at the center of the plaza, causing the surrounding skyscrapers to shift their position in the frame. The scene then evolves as the holographic fish swap sides, with the orange fish moving to the right and the blue fish to the left. Finally, the camera completes its arc as the pair cross paths once more, maintaining their continuous circular pattern around the urban center.

The shot follows a continuous aerial orbit that completes a full circle around a futuristic plaza, returning the viewer to the original starting perspective. It begins with the camera sweeping through the neon-lit air as the blue holographic koi makes a dramatic close pass, its translucent glowing fins momentarily filling the right side of the frame. As the blue fish swims past, the camera continues its trajectory, bringing the orange holographic fish back into view on the left side of the frame. The scene then settles as the surrounding skyscrapers shift back into their initial positions, seamlessly closing the loop of the urban landscape.
